44.reason: [Error: Assumes the maximum exponent is from the first terms only, but the maximum exponent could be from any pair. Should compute the actual maximum exponent sum from all terms.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Error: Assumes the maximum exponent is from the first terms only, but the maximum exponent could be from any pair. Should compute the actual maximum exponent sum from all terms.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Assumes node1[1] and node2[1] exist and have the highest degree; fails if either polynomial is empty or not sorted in descending order]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.25 , reason:  [Assumes node1[1] and node2[1] exist (i.e., cnt1>0 and cnt2>0), which may not be true for empty input; also, maximum exponent may not be node1[1].n + node2[1].n if terms are not input in descending order.]
